docket_entries.description: NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. PLAINTIFF OLEG VAKHITOV IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEX CAMACHO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY VAKHITOV, OLEG AS TO DEFENDANT CAMACHO, ALEX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2024 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOVEMBER 6, 2024 AT 10:00AM IN DEPARTMENT 506.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-02-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-23-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OLEG VAKHITOV IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEX CAMACHO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-23-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-23-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OLEG VAKHITOV IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY RUSSIAN INTERPRETER MARINA BRODSKAYA. DEFENDANT ALEX CAMACHO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALLYSYN OVERTON; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
